name: schoolme101-mcp
description: Production-ready MCP server foundation for Africa and South Africa education on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.check:wrangler: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const config = readFileSync('wrangler.toml', 'utf8'); if (config.includes('REPLACE_WITH_')) { console.error('wrangler.toml still contains placeholder Cloudflare binding IDs. Replace them before deploying.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.deploy: npm run typecheck && npm run check:wrangler && wrangler deploy --env production

author: SCHOOLME101
